[INFORMASI KONTEKS VISUAL GAMBAR]:
- Deskripsi Visual: Overview: A man wearing large black over-ear headphones sits indoors in front of dark curtains and a bright orange chair, looking downward toward something below the camera.

Main Subject: The main focus is a man with short dark hair and a dark mustache, wearing black over-ear headphones and a dark blue hoodie, with his head slightly bowed and his eyes looking down; his facial expression appears neutral or concentrated.

Setting: The scene appears to be indoors with a background that includes dark vertical curtains or panels on the right side and an orange upholstered chair on the left.

Visual Details: The man is framed from about the chest up in a close-up, with the camera angle roughly at eye level; lighting is relatively soft and even, coming from in front/above. The hoodie has visible folds and shadows around the neckline and shoulders. The orange chair is partially visible behind him on the left, and the right side background includes dark fabric with vertical lines.

Visible Text: 130 150

Practical Summary: The image shows a man wearing headphones and a hoodie, seated indoors and looking down as if reading or focusing on something out of frame. Dark curtains/panels and an orange chair make up the visible background.

Pertanyaan asli user: Analyze this image for NSFW (Not Safe For Work) / pornographic content / nudity. Reply strictly in JSON format with three fields: 'nsfw' (boolean: true if it contains nudity, porn, suggestive, or nsfw content, false if it is safe/sfw), 'confidence' (number: from 0 to 100 representing the likelihood of nsfw/nudity/suggestive content), and 'label' (string: 'porn', 'nsfw', 'suggestive', or 'safe' depending on the content). Do not include markdown formatting or backticks, just raw JSON.
